name: searchts
summary: The missing layer between AI and the web. Open-source escalating unlocker (browser-fingerprinted fetch -> JS-render relay -> stealth browser) for `read`, keyless multi-provider `search` with rank fusion, subtitles-first video `transcribe`, and on-demand asset/design-inspiration `grab` (palette/fonts/assets through the same unlocker). CLI + MCP server + Claude Code skill. Keyless by default; optional platform helpers.
